scores.correctness_notes: Covers all three notice types with correct descriptions, keys, and the ops pebble_custom_notice event. Matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: event.notice.last_data, event.workload.get_notice(), event.workload.get_notices() — these specific APIs (especially event.workload accessor and get_notice/get_notices methods) are not mentioned in the gold standard and may not exist exactly as described. The Notice object attributes like repeat_after, user_id are plausible but unverified. Minor risk of hallucinated API surface.
